eyebrow.es: Breakout de alfabetización en IA generativa · Grado 8
eyebrow.vi: Breakout hiểu biết AI tạo sinh · Lớp 8
eyebrow.ar: تحدّي الثقافة في الذكاء الاصطناعي التوليدي · الصف 8
eyebrow.ur: جنریٹِو اے آئی خواندگی بریک آؤٹ · جماعت 8
eyebrow.zh: 生成式 AI 素养破解 · 8 年级

chrome.sub: You're allowed to create with AI — but doing it honestly takes judgment. Crack four locks to learn how to use AI as a tool without crossing a line.
chrome.briefP: Generative AI is a powerful creation tool, and using it well is a real skill. But you stay the author — and the one responsible. Read the clues, then open all four locks. Each lock reveals the reasoning behind the answer.
chrome.footerText: Gen AI Literacy Breakouts · Runs entirely in your browser — no logins, no data collected.
chrome.winP: You learned to disclose when AI helped, to verify and revise its work, to respect others' creations, and to keep private information out of AI tools. That's responsible building.

clues.title: You're still the author
clues.body: Using AI to brainstorm or draft is a real skill. But you remain the author: you plan it, you make the decisions, and you are responsible for the final work you turn in.

clues.title: Honesty means disclosing
clues.body: Being honest means disclosing when AI helped — a short note like 'drafted with an AI assistant.' Passing AI work off as entirely your own is dishonest.

clues.title: Its mistakes become yours
clues.body: AI can be wrong or make things up. You must verify the facts and fix the errors before you submit. If you don't, its mistakes become your mistakes.

clues.title: Respect other creators
clues.body: AI can output text or images that copy someone else's work. Respect creators: don't claim that work as original, and don't use it where you don't have permission.

clues.title: Guard personal data
clues.body: Don't paste private information — real names, passwords, addresses, personal details — into an AI tool. Once you send it, you don't control where that data goes.

clues.title: A grade event
clues.body: The eighth-grade movie night features a space adventure film and unlimited popcorn. A fun plan — but it will not help you open any lock.

locks.title: The Responsible Move
locks.q: You used an AI to help draft an essay. What is the responsible thing to do?
options: Turn it in as-is and claim you wrote every word yourself
Verify the facts, revise it, and disclose that AI helped
Paste in classmates' personal details to make it longer
locks.reason: You stay responsible for the work, so you verify and revise it, and you're honest by disclosing that AI helped. Claiming it as fully your own, or leaking others' data, is not responsible.

locks.title: Responsible Habits
locks.q: Check EVERY responsible habit when creating with AI.

items.t: Disclosing that an AI helped with the work
Verifying facts and fixing errors before submitting
Keeping private information out of AI tools
Claiming AI-generated work as entirely your own
Sharing someone's personal details with a chatbot

locks.reason: Disclosing AI's help, verifying its work, and protecting private data are responsible. Claiming its work as your own or leaking personal details are not.

locks.title: Be Honest About It
locks.q: Being honest that an AI helped you — instead of hiding it — means you ______ its use.
locks.reason: Disclosing that AI helped is the honest choice; hiding it and claiming the work as entirely your own is not.

locks.title: Create Responsibly
locks.q: You'll use an AI to help make a class presentation. Tap the responsible steps in the RIGHT order.
locks.reason: First PLAN your own idea. Then DRAFT with the AI's help. Then VERIFY and revise the facts. Then CREDIT the AI's help. Plan, Draft, Verify, Credit.
